LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGEMENT, ARGUED, DENY BECAUSE (1)MOTION VIOLATES CCP 437C(F)(2) AND NO SHOWING OF DILIGENCE WITH RE TO "NEW FACTS"; (2)SEPARATE STATEMENT VIOLATES CRC 342; (3)LA JOLLA SUPPLEMENTED DISCOVERY ANSWERS AND (4)INDEMNITY PROVISION IS TYPE II AND THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE RE WHETHER DEFENDANT'S CONDUCT IS ACTIVE OR PASSIVE NEGLIGENCE. SEE MACDONALD & KRUSE, INC. V. SAN JOSE STEEL CO., INC., (1972) 29 CAL.APP.3D 413, 419. COUNSEL TO PREP ORDER. REPORTER: PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR #1193
